summary: Completed E2E testing for code-review fixes (auth/session migration, hook-safety). All 6 requested features verified: (1) Login flow works end-to-end, (2) Auth token is in sessionStorage and absent from localStorage, (3) Session hydration on app reload works correctly, (4) Core pages load without runtime errors (Activity, Builder home, Templates, Settings), (5) Builder existing draft open/edit/save works, (6) No regressions in role/user APIs.
critical_code_review_comments: sessionStorage migration in /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js correctly implemented with getSessionStorage(), getStorageItem(), setStorageItem(), removeStorageItem() helpers
App.js hydrateSession() correctly uses useCallback with empty deps array for stable reference
All page components (ActivityPage, BuilderPage, TemplatesPage, UserManagementPage) correctly use useCallback for data loading functions with proper dependency arrays
PreviewPane.jsx correctly uses useMemo for enabledSections and previewSections with proper dependencies
Minor ESLint warning in BuilderPage.jsx line 57: useMemo has unnecessary dependency 'compilePromptOutput' - this is a function reference that doesn't need to be in deps array
seed_data_creation: Modified existing draft title during testing (added ' - Iter12 Test' suffix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth storage migration from localStorage to sessionStorage is complete and working. Key implementation: api.js uses sessionStorage helpers (getSessionStorage, getStorageItem, setStorageItem, removeStorageItem). App.js hydrateSession() validates token on reload via /api/auth/me. All core pages (Activity, Builder, Templates, Settings) load without errors. Builder draft open/edit/save flow works correctly.

login_flow_e2e.details: Login with admin/admin123 works, returns access_token and user object, navigates to /activity

auth_token_in_sessionStorage.details: Token found in sessionStorage (reachall-auth-token), NOT in localStorage

session_hydration_on_reload.details: Page reload maintains logged-in state, /api/auth/me validates token successfully

core_pages_load.details: Activity, Builder home, Templates, Settings all load without runtime errors

builder_draft_open_edit_save.details: Opened existing draft, modified title, saved successfully with 'Draft updated successfully' toast

role_user_apis.details: All 15 backend tests passed: login, auth/me, token validation, list users, get roles, create/delete user, update role, core APIs
